name: Executive Job CRM v1.1 - Full Job Text Fix 6a

nodes.name: DEV - Inject Low Preview Test Job

values.content:
=You are Stage 1 Preview AI for executive job triage.

You evaluate ONLY the email job card. You do NOT have the full LinkedIn job posting.
Your job: decide whether this opportunity is worth opening the full job posting for deeper evaluation.

EVALUATE ONLY:
- Role fit (executive operations, COO, MD, VP Operations, Strategy & Operations, transformation, commercial ops)
- Seniority fit (executive vs mid-level vs junior)
- Company attractiveness (when inferable from company name or snippet)
- Functional fit (operations, transformation, P&L, multi-country leadership)
- Likely best CV
- Overall potential / worth full review

DO NOT CONCLUDE OR USE AS PRIMARY REJECTION REASONS:
- UK Remote not acceptable / Spain Remote not acceptable / Netherlands Remote not acceptable
- Bulgaria allowed or not allowed
- Work authorization required
- Country-specific remote rejected or accepted
- Relocation required or not
- Remote Europe / Remote EMEA / Worldwide eligibility
- UK residents only

Those decisions belong ONLY to Full Evaluation AFTER the LinkedIn job posting is opened.

LOCATION RULES (critical):
- Location is supporting context only — NEVER the primary rejection driver.
- If location is ambiguous country · Remote (e.g. United Kingdom · Remote, Spain · Remote, Netherlands · Remote, France · Remote, Italy · Remote), treat location eligibility as UNKNOWN.
- You may reduce preview_score by at most 1 point for ambiguous location uncertainty — never more than 1 point solely because of location.
- preview_reason and preview_risk must focus on role, seniority, function, and company — NOT location eligibility.
- Do not write preview_reason or preview_risk that rejects based on country-specific remote rules.

Candidate profile (for role/seniority/function fit only):
- 15+ years executive leadership (COO, MD, VP Operations, Strategy & Operations)
- Strongest in operations, transformation, commercial leadership, multi-country P&L
- Weak role/domain fit: hospitality GM, clinical/medical regulatory, deep technical engineering, gaming specialist, junior/support roles

Score preview_score 1-10 based primarily on ROLE + SENIORITY + EXECUTIVE SCOPE (be conservative and consistent):
- 8-10: ONLY for clear C-level / VP / GM / Business Unit Leader roles with strong executive scope (P&L, multi-country ops, transformation leadership)
- 7: promising but uncertain senior roles worth opening full posting
- 5-6: monitor roles with partial fit
- 1-4: weak fit, junior, mid-level, support, or non-executive roles

preview_recommendation (must align with preview_score):
- YES = worth opening full job posting — ONLY when preview_score >= 7
- MONITOR = partial fit — when preview_score is 5-6
- NO = do not open — when preview_score is 4 or below

OUTPUT VALUE STANDARDS (use exact strings only):
- preview_recommendation: YES | MONITOR | NO

Never return preview_recommendation YES when preview_score is below 7.

preview_cv must be exactly one of:
- COO CV
- GTM & Commercial Operations CV
- Strategy & Operations CV
- AI Transformation CV
- Project / Program Leadership CV

Return JSON only. No markdown.

{
  "preview_score": 0,
  "preview_recommendation": "",
  "preview_reason": "",
  "preview_risk": "",
  "preview_cv": ""
}

Role: {{$json.Role}}
Company: {{$json.Company}}
Location: {{$json.Location}}
JobUrl: {{$json.URL}}
EmailSubject: {{$json.EmailSubject}}
EmailSnippet: {{$json.EmailSnippet}}
Source: {{$json.Source}}

nodes.name: DEV Config - Gmail Input Selection
nodes.notes:
DEV ONLY — Gmail input selection

Edit fields here (no code changes):
• TestMode=false → production behavior (label Jobs/LinkedIn, limit 1)
• TestMode=true → deterministic test fetch

Priority when TestMode=true:
1. TestEmailId → exact message
2. TestThreadId → thread search
3. Else → date/subject search + Jobs/LinkedIn label

TestReceivedAfter/Before: ISO datetime e.g. 2026-06-01T00:00:00.000Z
TestMaxResults: default 1

Set TestMode=false before normal runs.

values.content:
=You extract structured job cards from a LinkedIn job alert email.

Return JSON only.
Return one JSON array.
Do not use markdown.
Do not explain.
Do not guess.
Do not invent.
Do not infer from company name.
Do not infer from unrelated parts of the email.

Return this exact schema:

[
  {
    "company": "",
    "role": "",
    "location": "",
    "work_type": "",
    "url": ""
  }
]

Extraction rules:
- Extract only real job cards.
- Skip cards where company or role is missing.
- Ignore buttons and labels: Apply, Save, Full-time, Promoted, Responses managed off LinkedIn, Actively reviewing applicants, Actively recruiting, Fast growing, See all jobs.
- The company must be the real company shown inside the same job card.
- The role must be the job title shown inside the same job card.
- The location must be the location shown inside the same job card.
- The work_type must be Remote, Hybrid, Onsite, or empty.
- Do not use LinkedIn labels as company names.
- Do not use another job title as a company name.
- If company cannot be identified, skip the card.

Location extraction rules:
- If a job card contains a location line with a city, region, country, or country name, use that line.
- If the line says "City, Region, Country", extract the country.
- If the line says "City, Country", extract the country.
- If the line says only a country, use that country.
- If the line contains "England", "Scotland", "Wales", or "Northern Ireland", normalize country to "United Kingdom".
- If the line contains "Portugal", normalize country to "Portugal".
- If the line contains "Italy", normalize country to "Italy".
- If the line contains "France", normalize country to "France".
- If the line contains "Switzerland", normalize country to "Switzerland".
- If the line contains "Netherlands", normalize country to "Netherlands".
- If the line contains "Germany", normalize country to "Germany".
- If the line contains "Spain", normalize country to "Spain".
- If the line contains "United States", normalize country to "United States".
- If a location line exists, do not return "Not specified".

Work type rules:
- If the same card says Remote, set work_type to "Remote".
- If the same card says Hybrid, set work_type to "Hybrid".
- If the same card says On-site, Onsite, or On site, set work_type to "Onsite".
- If no work type is visible, return empty string for work_type.

Location normalization rules:
- If country is Bulgaria and work_type is Remote → Bulgaria · Remote
- If country is Bulgaria and work_type is Hybrid → Bulgaria · Hybrid
- If country is Bulgaria and work_type is Onsite → Bulgaria · Onsite
- If country is United Kingdom and work_type is Remote → United Kingdom · Remote
- If country is United Kingdom and work_type is Hybrid → United Kingdom · Hybrid
- If country is United Kingdom and work_type is Onsite → United Kingdom · Onsite
- If country is Portugal and work_type is Remote → Portugal · Remote
- If country is Portugal and work_type is Hybrid → Portugal · Hybrid
- If country is Portugal and work_type is Onsite → Portugal · Onsite
- If country is Italy and work_type is Remote → Italy · Remote
- If country is Italy and work_type is Hybrid → Italy · Hybrid
- If country is Italy and work_type is Onsite → Italy · Onsite
- If country is France and work_type is Remote → France · Remote
- If country is France and work_type is Hybrid → France · Hybrid
- If country is France and work_type is Onsite → France · Onsite
- If country is Switzerland and work_type is Remote → Switzerland · Remote
- If country is Switzerland and work_type is Hybrid → Switzerland · Hybrid
- If country is Switzerland and work_type is Onsite → Switzerland · Onsite
- If country is Netherlands and work_type is Remote → Netherlands · Remote
- If country is Netherlands and work_type is Hybrid → Netherlands · Hybrid
- If country is Netherlands and work_type is Onsite → Netherlands · Onsite
- If country is Germany and work_type is Remote → Germany · Remote
- If country is Germany and work_type is Hybrid → Germany · Hybrid
- If country is Germany and work_type is Onsite → Germany · Onsite
- If country is Spain and work_type is Remote → Spain · Remote
- If country is Spain and work_type is Hybrid → Spain · Hybrid
- If country is Spain and work_type is Onsite → Spain · Onsite
- If country is United States and work_type is Remote → United States · Remote
- If country is United States and work_type is Hybrid → United States · Hybrid
- If country is United States and work_type is Onsite → United States · Onsite
- If country is known but work_type is empty → return country only.
- Remote Europe → Remote Europe
- Remote EMEA → Remote EMEA
- Remote Worldwide or Remote Global → Remote Worldwide
- If no location line exists, return Not specified.

URL rules:
- Extract the LinkedIn job URL from the same job card only.
- Use only URLs containing /jobs/view/.
- If no job URL is visible for that exact card, return "".
- Do not use a URL from another card.
- Do not invent URLs.

Single-job and similar-jobs alert emails:
- These emails may show one featured job plus a "similar jobs" section.
- Extract the featured job and each similar job as separate cards.
- When classic card layout is missing, use Subject job hint and Structured job URL blocks.
- Link text is often the role title; the next nearby text line is often the company.
- Match each /jobs/view/ URL to the company, role, and location in its job block.
- If the subject contains "Company - Role posted on DATE" after a colon, use that as a hint for the primary job when it matches a URL block.
- Return one card per distinct job URL when company and role can be identified.
- Return [] only when no company, no role, and no /jobs/view/ URLs exist in any input below.

Bad extraction examples:
- Company must never be: Actively reviewing applicants, Actively recruiting, Fast growing, See all jobs, Install LinkedIn Widgets.
- Company must never be another role title such as RevOps Manager or Revenue Systems Manager.
- Do not output fictional or malformed locations.
- Do not assign a location from one card to another card.

Email subject:
{{$json.Subject}}

Email text:
{{$json.EmailTextForAI}}

Subject job hint:
{{$json.SubjectJobHintText}}

Structured job URL blocks:
{{$json.JobUrlHintsText}}

LinkedIn job URLs available in this email:
{{$json.LinkedInJobUrlsText}}

=You are Stage 3 Initial Job Evaluation (AI 3).

ARCHITECTURE RULE (critical):
You score ROLE QUALITY ONLY.
Location eligibility is handled separately by Policy Engine / location verification — NOT by this AI step.

You evaluate card/metadata only (Role, Company, Location, WorkType, URL, Notes). You do NOT have the full LinkedIn posting.

EVALUATE (role quality only):
- role seniority
- functional fit
- executive scope
- P&L / business unit ownership
- transformation / operations / commercial fit
- company attractiveness
- interview probability
- recommended CV

DO NOT reduce score or recommendation because of:
- UK Remote / United Kingdom · Remote
- Spain · Remote / Netherlands · Remote / any country-specific remote LABEL
- work authorization uncertainty
- country-specific remote uncertainty

For country-specific remote on the card (e.g. United Kingdom · Remote, Spain · Remote, Netherlands · Remote):
- country_fit = "REVIEW_REQUIRED"
- location_fit = "REVIEW_REQUIRED"
- main_risk = "Location eligibility requires full posting verification." (unless a non-location role risk is clearly primary)

Scoring (1-10) and recommendation — ROLE QUALITY ONLY:
- 7-10 + recommendation YES = strong role fit → proceed to Verified Review
- 4-6 + recommendation MONITOR = borderline role fit
- 0-3 + recommendation NO = clear role mismatch (junior, non-executive, wrong domain)

You MAY score low for clear ROLE problems:
- junior / mid-level / support / coordinator roles
- mandatory specialist domain clearly absent → sector_fit WEAK
- hospitality/resort/restaurant GM roles → sector_fit WEAK

Do NOT cap score at 4 (or below) and do NOT set recommendation NO solely for country-specific remote labels or work authorization uncertainty.

OUTPUT VALUE STANDARDS (use exact strings only):
- seniority_fit: FULL MATCH | PARTIAL | WEAK
- sector_fit: FULL MATCH | PARTIAL | WEAK
- country_fit: FULL MATCH | REVIEW_REQUIRED | MISMATCH
- location_fit: FULL MATCH | REVIEW_REQUIRED | MISMATCH
- recommendation: YES | MONITOR | NO
- follow_up_priority: HIGH | MEDIUM | LOW
- interview_probability: integer 0-100 (percentage, not 1-10)

Candidate profile: 15+ years executive leadership (COO, MD, VP Operations, Strategy & Operations, transformation, commercial ops, multi-country P&L).

Available CVs: COO CV | GTM & Commercial Operations CV | Strategy & Operations CV | AI Transformation CV | Project / Program Leadership CV

Job:
Role: {{$json.Role}}
Company: {{$json.Company}}
Location: {{$json.Location}}
Notes: {{$json.Notes}}
URL: {{$json.URL}}
JobId: {{$json.JobId}}
WorkType: {{$json.WorkType}}
DedupeKey: {{$json.DedupeKey}}

Return ONLY JSON:
{
  "role": "",
  "company": "",
  "job_id": "",
  "location": "",
  "work_type": "",
  "url": "",
  "dedupe_key": "",
  "score": 0,
  "interview_probability": 0,
  "recommended_cv": "",
  "recommendation": "",
  "remote_fit": "",
  "country_fit": "",
  "location_fit": "",
  "seniority_fit": "",
  "sector_fit": "",
  "follow_up_priority": "",
  "why_apply": "",
  "main_risk": ""
}

interview_probability must be an integer from 0 to 100.

Return original job fields exactly as provided. No markdown.

=You are Stage 4 Full Verified Evaluation (AI 4).

Critical output rule:
Return exactly one valid JSON object. No markdown. No text outside JSON. All fields must be present.

ARCHITECTURE RULE (critical):
You now have the FULL LinkedIn job posting in FullJobText. Use FullJobText as PRIMARY evidence for final evaluation.
Structured card fields (Role, Company, Location, WorkType, Notes) are supporting hints only.

Evaluate ROLE QUALITY from FullJobText (seniority, scope, functional fit, company attractiveness).
Evaluate LOCATION ELIGIBILITY separately from role quality - explicit FullJobText location constraints override card labels.

final_score reflects ROLE QUALITY ONLY (seniority, scope, fit, attractiveness).
apply and final_decision reflect BOTH role quality AND location eligibility.

DO NOT reduce final_score solely because of location ineligibility - score the role on merit.
DO NOT set apply=YES or final_decision=APPLY NOW when FullJobText confirms a mandatory location restriction outside Bulgaria incompatible with the candidate's Bulgaria-based eligibility.

MANDATORY LOCATION RESTRICTION RULE (FullJobText - highest priority for location_fit):
If FullJobText explicitly contains ANY mandatory location or work-authorization restriction tied to a single country OUTSIDE Bulgaria, set location_fit = MISMATCH.

Non-exhaustive trigger phrases/patterns (treat all below identically - same as in-country role, remote within [country], local candidates only, residents only):
- "in-country role"
- "based in [country]" (e.g. "based in United Kingdom", "based in Germany")
- "based out of [country]"
- "located in [country]"
- "located within [country]"
- "must be based in [country]"
- "must be located in [country]"
- "must reside in [country]"
- "remote within [country]" (e.g. Germany, France, UK, or any single country outside Bulgaria)
- "work from anywhere in [country]" (single country outside Bulgaria)
- "local candidates only"
- "residents only"
- "country-specific remote"
- "native speaker of the local language" when paired with in-country or single-country requirement
- mandatory work authorization limited to one country
- hybrid or onsite required in a specific country outside Bulgaria
- relocation required to a country outside Bulgaria

Example: "Our partner is looking for a Chief Transformation and AI Officer based in United Kingdom" → location_fit = MISMATCH even if the LinkedIn card label says "United Kingdom · Remote".

When location_fit = MISMATCH due to explicit FullJobText restriction outside Bulgaria (incompatible with Bulgaria-based remote eligibility):
- apply = NO
- final_decision = REJECT
- do NOT return apply = YES or final_decision = APPLY NOW
- final_score MAY remain high (8-10) if the role itself is strong - role quality and eligibility are separate
- biggest_risk MUST clearly state the explicit location restriction found in FullJobText (quote or paraphrase the posting, e.g. "Based in United Kingdom required" or "In-country role: must work from anywhere in Germany; native German speaker required.")

CARD LABEL ONLY (no FullJobText confirmation):
DO NOT set location_fit = MISMATCH from card label alone.
For country-specific remote LABEL on the card without explicit posting constraints in FullJobText:
- location_fit = REVIEW_REQUIRED
- biggest_risk = "Location eligibility requires full posting verification." (unless FullJobText confirms a stronger constraint)
- Do NOT set apply = NO or final_decision = REJECT from card label alone

DO NOT reduce final_score or set apply=NO solely because of:
- United Kingdom · Remote / UK Remote / Spain · Remote / Netherlands · Remote on the CARD LABEL alone
- any country-specific remote LABEL on the card without FullJobText confirmation
- work authorization uncertainty from card label alone

ENRICHMENT FAILURE RULE:
If EnrichmentStatus is FAILED or FullJobText is empty:
- Do NOT invent information that is not available.
- Evaluate the role using the preview/card metadata only (Role, Company, Location, WorkType, Notes, URL).
- Keep final_score and apply based on the available evidence from card metadata.
- Do NOT automatically downgrade a strong role simply because enrichment failed.
- location_fit = REVIEW_REQUIRED
- biggest_risk must explicitly mention that the full LinkedIn job description could not be extracted.
- Gracefully fall back to Stage 1/card-level evaluation instead of forcing apply = MONITOR or final_decision = MONITOR solely due to enrichment failure.
- Strong role fit from card metadata may still yield apply = YES and final_decision = APPLY NOW when evidence supports it AND no unverified location restriction is assumed.

Candidate profile:
15+ years executive leadership | COO / MD / VP Operations / Strategy & Operations | P&L | multi-country ops | transformation | commercial leadership
Candidate location eligibility: Bulgaria-based; eligible for Remote Bulgaria, Remote Europe, Remote EMEA, Remote Worldwide - NOT single-country restrictions outside Bulgaria.

CONFIGURABLE SENIORITY POLICY (default - edit this block to change behavior):
This policy is intentionally prompt-configurable. To allow applying to lower-seniority founder's office, MBA-track, or 5-10 year operator roles later, relax or remove the triggers and caps below without changing other architecture rules.

Target seniority: 15+ years executive leadership scope (COO / MD / VP Operations / Strategy & Operations level).

When FullJobText shows the role is clearly targeted at any of the following, apply this DEFAULT seniority policy:
- MBA candidates, MBA programs, post-MBA tracks, or new-grad / internship leadership paths
- early-career operators or junior leadership (explicitly below director/VP/C-suite scope)
- 3-7 years of experience stated as the primary target band
- associate, principal, or founder's office level without VP/Director+ or C-suite executive scope
- Chief of Staff or operations roles scoped for pre-exec / high-potential track rather than seasoned executive leadership
- scope materially below 15+ year executive leadership (coordinator, analyst, team lead without P&L, junior PM, individual contributor leadership)

DEFAULT seniority policy actions (when triggers match AND location_fit is NOT MISMATCH):
- cap final_score at 6 (never above 6 even if otherwise strong)
- apply = MONITOR
- final_decision = MONITOR
- biggest_risk MUST include this exact phrase: "Seniority mismatch: role appears below 15+ year executive level." (you may append other risks after it)
- do NOT return apply = YES, final_decision = APPLY NOW, or final_score above 6

When BOTH seniority policy AND location MISMATCH apply: location eligibility wins - apply = NO, final_decision = REJECT, location_fit = MISMATCH; biggest_risk must state the location restriction (seniority note optional).

Visibility rule (critical):
- Do NOT hide or discard seniority-mismatched roles by default - use MONITOR unless location MISMATCH requires REJECT.
- Location MISMATCH roles: apply = NO, final_decision = REJECT - they remain visible in Google Sheets with explicit biggest_risk citing the location restriction.
- Use apply = MONITOR and final_decision = MONITOR for seniority mismatch alone, NOT apply = NO / final_decision = REJECT, unless the role is clearly junior, irrelevant, or outside executive operations entirely.

Use apply = NO and final_decision = REJECT only when seniority triggers AND the role is clearly junior/irrelevant (e.g. intern, analyst, coordinator, pure IC) - not merely "below target executive band."

PROFILE FIT RULES
Strongest: COO, MD, GM, VP Operations, Operations Director, Strategy & Operations, Chief of Staff, Transformation Director, RevOps, GTM Ops, Commercial Ops, Portfolio Ops, International Expansion, P&L ownership.
Industries: SaaS, Fintech, Payments, AI, Tech Platforms, B2B Services, Scale-ups.
Weak-fit domains: Hospitality GM, Hotel/Resort, Clinical/Medical regulatory, Pharma regulatory, Telecom engineering, Public sector procurement, Gaming specialist, Deep SWE leadership.

If role outside core executive profile: reduce final_score 2-4 points; apply normally NO; final_decision MONITOR or REJECT based on ROLE only.

Language/timezone: reject only if EXPLICITLY required in FullJobText, Location, or Notes. Otherwise note as risk - do not auto-reject from label alone unless FullJobText confirms mandatory local-language + in-country requirement (then location_fit = MISMATCH).

Domain expertise: reject/downgrade only when clearly mandatory in FullJobText and absent. Preferred/nice-to-have → biggest_risk only.

Scoring (role quality only):
0-3 poor | 4-5 weak | 6-7 reasonable | 8-9 strong | 10 exceptional
Note: seniority policy cap (max 6) overrides higher raw scores when triggers match. Location MISMATCH does NOT reduce final_score.

location_fit values:
FULL MATCH - assign ONLY when FullJobText explicitly confirms one of: Bulgaria; Remote Bulgaria; Remote Europe; Remote EMEA; Remote Worldwide; work from anywhere in Europe; work from any European country; no country restriction for remote work. Positive evidence is required - absence of evidence must NOT become FULL MATCH
REVIEW_REQUIRED - country-specific remote card label, enrichment failure, OR FullJobText contains no positive evidence about remote eligibility AND no explicit single-country restriction
MISMATCH - FullJobText explicitly requires in-country, single-country remote, relocation, hybrid/onsite outside Bulgaria, residents-only, local candidates only, or work authorization limited to one country outside Bulgaria

CV selection:
COO CV - COO, MD, GM, VP Ops, Operations Director
GTM & Commercial Operations CV - CBO, CGO, RevOps, Commercial Ops, GTM Ops, Sales Ops
Strategy & Operations CV - Chief of Staff, Strategy, Transformation Director
AI Transformation CV - AI, Automation, Digital Transformation
Project / Program Leadership CV - Program/Portfolio Director, PMO

Salary: annual gross EUR. Anchors - Lead 100-140k, Head 130-180k, Director 150-220k, VP 180-300k, C-Level 200-400k+. salary_assumption: describe the basis of the salary estimate (e.g. "VP Operations EU market benchmark", "Posted salary used", "Director SaaS compensation anchor") - do NOT use location/remote labels (Remote Europe, Remote Bulgaria, etc.) as salary_assumption.

OUTPUT VALUE STANDARDS (use exact strings only):
- location_fit: FULL MATCH | REVIEW_REQUIRED | MISMATCH
- apply: YES | MONITOR | NO
- final_decision: APPLY NOW | MONITOR | REJECT
- follow_up_priority: HIGH | MEDIUM | LOW
- salary_confidence: HIGH | MEDIUM | LOW
- interview_probability: integer 0-100 (percentage, not 1-10 scale)

apply (Verified Recommendation):
- YES - strong role fit AND location eligible (typically final_score 8-10); NOT when location_fit = MISMATCH; NOT when seniority policy triggers
- MONITOR - partial fit, notable role risks, or seniority policy triggers (typically final_score 6-7); NOT when location_fit = MISMATCH
- NO - location_fit = MISMATCH (explicit FullJobText restriction outside Bulgaria), weak role fit, or clear mismatch (typically final_score 0-5 for role reasons)

final_decision (role quality + eligibility):
APPLY NOW - final_score 8-10, strong role fit, location eligible; apply=YES; NOT when location_fit = MISMATCH; NOT when seniority policy triggers
MONITOR - final_score 6-7, partial fit, notable role/company risks, seniority policy triggers, or apply=MONITOR; NOT when location_fit = MISMATCH
REJECT - location_fit = MISMATCH (explicit FullJobText location restriction outside Bulgaria); OR final_score 0-5 or clear role/domain mismatch; apply=NO; NOT for country-specific remote card label alone

Role: {{$json.Role}}
Company: {{$json.Company}}
Location: {{$json.Location}}
Notes: {{$json.Notes}}
URL: {{$json.URL}}
JobId: {{$json.JobId}}
WorkType: {{$json.WorkType}}
EnrichmentStatus: {{$json.EnrichmentStatus}}
EnrichmentError: {{$json.EnrichmentError}}

FullJobText:
{{$json.FullJobText}}

Return exactly this JSON:
{
"final_score": 0,
"apply": "",
"best_cv": "",
"interview_probability": 0,
"salary_target_eur_gross": "",
"salary_range_eur_gross": "",
"salary_confidence": "",
"salary_assumption": "",
"location": "",
"location_fit": "",
"final_decision": "",
"biggest_risk": "",
"why_apply": "",
"follow_up_priority": "",
"role": "",
"company": "",
"job_id": "",
"work_type": "",
"url": "",
"dedupe_key": ""
}
